case_title: BARBARA WHITE VS. VICKIE E. ELEY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-15-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF'S SON CALLED TODAY AND INDICATED THE SHE (PLAINTIFF) RECENTLY GOT OUT OF THE HOSPITAL AND REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE ON HER BEHALF - OK PER JPT CUMNINGS TO CONTINUE MATTER. JPT: SASHA CUMMINGS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID HUARD FILED BY WHITE, BARBARA ELEY, VICKIE E.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,430.00 FILED BY WHITE, BARBARA AS TO DEFENDANT ELEY, VICKIE E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2009 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE, BARBARA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ELEY, VICKIE E. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
